# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _
import groovy.transform.Field
import java.security.MessageDigest
import java.net.URL
import java.net.HttpURLConnection

@Field final List<String> ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS = ['https']
@Field final List<String> ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
    's3.amazonaws.com',
    's3-*.amazonaws.com',
    'artifactory.company.com',
    'artifacts.company.com'
]
@Field final long MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE = 2L * 1024 * 1024 * 1024 // 2GB
@Field final int CONNECTION_TIMEOUT = 30000
@Field final int READ_TIMEOUT = 300000

pipeline {
    agent { label 'deployment-agent' }
    
    parameters {
        text(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'JSON array of artifact URLs with checksums. Example: [{"url":"https://artifacts.company.com/app.war","checksum":"sha256:abc123...","destination":"/opt/app/"}]'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target environment for deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of server hostnames or IPs'
        )
        password(
            name: 'DEPLOYMENT_KEY',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment authentication key'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VERIFY_CHECKSUMS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Verify artifact checksums before deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Backup existing artifacts before deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ROLLBACK_VERSION',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Version to rollback to (leave empty for new deployment)'
        )
    }
    
    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timeout(time: 2, unit: 'HOURS')
        timestamps()
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOYMENT_LOG = "${WORKSPACE}/deployment.log"
        VAULT_ADDR = credentials('vault-address')
        ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING = 'False'
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    validateParameters()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Parse Artifact Configuration') {
            steps {
                script {
                    env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG = parseArtifactConfiguration(params.ARTIFACT_URLS)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Security Validation') {
            steps {
                script {
                    performSecurityValidation()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    downloadArtifacts()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Checksums') {
            when {
                expression { params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS == true }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyArtifactChecksums()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    scanArtifactsForThreats()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    prepareDeployment()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Backup Existing Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { params.BACKUP_EXISTING == true && params.ROLLBACK_VERSION == '' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    backupExistingArtifacts()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Servers') {
            steps {
                script {
                    deployToServers()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Verify Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    verifyDeployment()
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            steps {
                script {
                    performHealthCheck()
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                notifyDeploymentSuccess()
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                notifyDeploymentFailure()
                if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
                    echo "Deployment failed. Backup available for rollback."
                }
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                cleanupWorkspace()
            }
        }
    }
}

def validateParameters() {
    echo "Validating pipeline parameters..."
    
    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS || params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required")
    }
    
    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS || params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS parameter is required")
    }
    
    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_KEY || params.DEPLOYMENT_KEY.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("DEPLOYMENT_KEY parameter is required")
    }
    
    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',')
    servers.each { server ->
        def trimmedServer = server.trim()
        if (!isValidHostname(trimmedServer) && !isValidIPAddress(trimmedServer)) {
            error("Invalid server hostname or IP: ${trimmedServer}")
        }
    }
    
    echo "Parameter validation completed successfully"
}

def parseArtifactConfiguration(String jsonConfig) {
    echo "Parsing artifact configuration..."
    
    try {
        def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
        def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(jsonConfig)
        
        if (!(artifacts instanceof List)) {
            error("ARTIFACT_URLS must be a JSON array")
        }
        
        if (artifacts.isEmpty()) {
            error("At least one artifact must be specified")
        }
        
        artifacts.each { artifact ->
            if (!artifact.url) {
                error("Each artifact must have a 'url' field")
            }
            if (!artifact.destination) {
                error("Each artifact must have a 'destination' field")
            }
            if (params.VERIFY_CHECKSUMS && !artifact.checksum) {
                error("Checksum verification enabled but checksum missing for: ${artifact.url}")
            }
        }
        
        echo "Parsed ${artifacts.size()} artifact(s)"
        return groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(artifacts)
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        error("Failed to parse artifact configuration: ${e.message}")
    }
}

def performSecurityValidation() {
    echo "Performing security validation..."
    
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    artifacts.each { artifact ->
        validateArtifactURL(artifact.url)
        validateDestinationPath(artifact.destination)
    }
    
    if (params.ENVIRONMENT == 'production') {
        echo "Production deployment - additional security checks..."
        
        def approvers = ['admin', 'release-manager']
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES') {
            input(
                message: "Approve production deployment?",
                submitter: approvers.join(',')
            )
        }
    }
    
    echo "Security validation completed"
}

def validateArtifactURL(String urlString) {
    try {
        URL url = new URL(urlString)
        
        def protocol = url.getProtocol().toLowerCase()
        if (!ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS.contains(protocol)) {
            error("Protocol '${protocol}' not allowed. Only ${ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS} are permitted.")
        }
        
        def host = url.getHost().toLowerCase()
        def isAllowed = ALLOWED_DOMAINS.any { allowedDomain ->
            if (allowedDomain.contains('*')) {
                def pattern = allowedDomain.replace('.', '\\.').replace('*', '.*')
                return host.matches(pattern)
            } else {
                return host == allowedDomain || host.endsWith('.' + allowedDomain)
            }
        }
        
        if (!isAllowed) {
            error("Domain '${host}' not in allowed domains list")
        }
        
        if (urlString.contains('..') || urlString.contains('//')) {
            error("URL contains suspicious path traversal patterns")
        }
        
    } catch (java.net.MalformedURLException e) {
        error("Invalid URL format: ${urlString}")
    }
}

def validateDestinationPath(String path) {
    if (path.contains('..')) {
        error("Destination path contains path traversal: ${path}")
    }
    
    if (!path.startsWith('/opt/') && !path.startsWith('/var/app/') && !path.startsWith('/usr/local/app/')) {
        error("Destination path must be in allowed directories: ${path}")
    }
    
    def dangerousPaths = ['/etc/', '/bin/', '/sbin/', '/usr/bin/', '/usr/sbin/', '/root/', '/home/']
    dangerousPaths.each { dangerous ->
        if (path.startsWith(dangerous)) {
            error("Destination path not allowed: ${path}")
        }
    }
}

def downloadArtifacts() {
    echo "Downloading artifacts..."
    
    sh "mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}"
    
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    artifacts.eachWithIndex { artifact, index ->
        echo "Downloading artifact ${index + 1}/${artifacts.size()}: ${artifact.url}"
        
        def filename = getFilenameFromURL(artifact.url)
        def localPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${filename}"
        
        downloadFile(artifact.url, localPath)
        
        artifact.localPath = localPath
        artifact.filename = filename
    }
    
    env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(artifacts)
    echo "All artifacts downloaded successfully"
}

def downloadFile(String urlString, String destination) {
    def maxRetries = 3
    def retryCount = 0
    def success = false
    
    while (retryCount < maxRetries && !success) {
        try {
            URL url = new URL(urlString)
            HttpURLConnection connection = (HttpURLConnection) url.openConnection()
            connection.setRequestMethod("GET")
            connection.setConnectTimeout(CONNECTION_TIMEOUT)
            connection.setReadTimeout(READ_TIMEOUT)
            connection.setInstanceFollowRedirects(false)
            
            def responseCode = connection.getResponseCode()
            
            if (responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_PERM || 
                responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_TEMP ||
                responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_SEE_OTHER) {
                def redirectUrl = connection.getHeaderField("Location")
                validateArtifactURL(redirectUrl)
                connection.disconnect()
                downloadFile(redirectUrl, destination)
                return
            }
            
            if (responseCode != HttpURLConnection.HTTP_OK) {
                throw new Exception("HTTP error code: ${responseCode}")
            }
            
            def contentLength = connection.getContentLengthLong()
            if (contentLength > MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE) {
                throw new Exception("Artifact size (${contentLength}) exceeds maximum allowed size (${MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE})")
            }
            
            def inputStream = connection.getInputStream()
            def outputStream = new FileOutputStream(destination)
            
            byte[] buffer = new byte[8192]
            int bytesRead
            long totalBytesRead = 0
            
            while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                outputStream.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
                totalBytesRead += bytesRead
                
                if (totalBytesRead > MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE) {
                    outputStream.close()
                    inputStream.close()
                    connection.disconnect()
                    new File(destination).delete()
                    throw new Exception("Artifact size exceeds maximum allowed size during download")
                }
            }
            
            outputStream.close()
            inputStream.close()
            connection.disconnect()
            
            success = true
            echo "Downloaded ${totalBytesRead} bytes to ${destination}"
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            retryCount++
            echo "Download attempt ${retryCount} failed: ${e.message}"
            
            if (retryCount >= maxRetries) {
                error("Failed to download artifact after ${maxRetries} attempts: ${urlString}")
            }
            
            sleep(time: 5 * retryCount, unit: 'SECONDS')
        }
    }
}

def getFilenameFromURL(String urlString) {
    def url = new URL(urlString)
    def path = url.getPath()
    def filename = path.substring(path.lastIndexOf('/') + 1)
    
    if (filename.isEmpty()) {
        filename = "artifact_${System.currentTimeMillis()}"
    }
    
    filename = filename.replaceAll('[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]', '_')
    
    return filename
}

def verifyArtifactChecksums() {
    echo "Verifying artifact checksums..."
    
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    artifacts.each { artifact ->
        if (artifact.checksum) {
            def parts = artifact.checksum.split(':')
            if (parts.length != 2) {
                error("Invalid checksum format. Expected 'algorithm:hash', got: ${artifact.checksum}")
            }
            
            def algorithm = parts[0].toLowerCase()
            def expectedHash = parts[1].toLowerCase()
            
            def actualHash = calculateChecksum(artifact.localPath, algorithm)
            
            if (actualHash != expectedHash) {
                error("Checksum mismatch for ${artifact.filename}. Expected: ${expectedHash}, Got: ${actualHash}")
            }
            
            echo "Checksum verified for ${artifact.filename}: ${algorithm}:${actualHash}"
        }
    }
    
    echo "All checksums verified successfully"
}

def calculateChecksum(String filePath, String algorithm) {
    def algorithmMap = [
        'md5': 'MD5',
        'sha1': 'SHA-1',
        'sha256': 'SHA-256',
        'sha512': 'SHA-512'
    ]
    
    def javaAlgorithm = algorithmMap[algorithm]
    if (!javaAlgorithm) {
        error("Unsupported checksum algorithm: ${algorithm}")
    }
    
    def digest = MessageDigest.getInstance(javaAlgorithm)
    def file = new File(filePath)
    def inputStream = new FileInputStream(file)
    
    byte[] buffer = new byte[8192]
    int bytesRead
    
    while ((bytesRead = inputStream.read(buffer)) != -1) {
        digest.update(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
    }
    
    inputStream.close()
    
    def hashBytes = digest.digest()
    def hashString = hashBytes.collect { String.format('%02x', it) }.join('')
    
    return hashString
}

def scanArtifactsForThreats() {
    echo "Scanning artifacts for security threats..."
    
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    artifacts.each { artifact ->
        echo "Scanning ${artifact.filename}..."
        
        def fileType = sh(
            script: "file -b '${artifact.localPath}'",
            returnStdout: true
        ).trim()
        
        echo "File type: ${fileType}"
        
        if (fileType.toLowerCase().contains('executable') || 
            fileType.toLowerCase().contains('script')) {
            echo "WARNING: Executable or script file detected: ${artifact.filename}"
        }
        
        def fileSize = new File(artifact.localPath).length()
        if (fileSize == 0) {
            error("Artifact file is empty: ${artifact.filename}")
        }
        
        artifact.fileType = fileType
        artifact.fileSize = fileSize
    }
    
    env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson(artifacts)
    echo "Artifact scanning completed"
}

def prepareDeployment() {
    echo "Preparing deployment configuration..."
    
    writeFile file: "${WORKSPACE}/inventory.ini", text: generateInventory()
    
    def playbookContent = generateAnsiblePlaybook()
    writeFile file: "${WORKSPACE}/deploy.yml", text: playbookContent
    
    sh """
        chmod 600 ${WORKSPACE}/inventory.ini
        chmod 600 ${WORKSPACE}/deploy.yml
    """
    
    echo "Deployment configuration prepared"
}

def generateInventory() {
    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
    
    def inventory = """
[deployment_servers]
${servers.join('\n')}

[deployment_servers:vars]
ansible_user=deploy
ansible_ssh_private_key_file=${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
ansible_python_interpreter=/usr/bin/python3
"""
    
    return inventory
}

def generateAnsiblePlaybook() {
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    def tasks = []
    
    if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
        tasks << """
    - name: Create backup directory
      file:
        path: "/var/backups/deployment/{{ ansible_date_time.epoch }}"
        state: directory
        mode: '0750'
      become: yes
"""
    }
    
    artifacts.each { artifact ->
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            tasks << """
    - name: Backup existing ${artifact.filename}
      shell: |
        if [ -f "${artifact.destination}/${artifact.filename}" ]; then
          cp -p "${artifact.destination}/${artifact.filename}" "/var/backups/deployment/{{ ansible_date_time.epoch }}/"
        fi
      become: yes
      ignore_errors: yes
"""
        }
        
        tasks << """
    - name: Create destination directory for ${artifact.filename}
      file:
        path: "${artifact.destination}"
        state: directory
        mode: '0755'
      become: yes

    - name: Copy ${artifact.filename} to server
      copy:
        src: "${artifact.localPath}"
        dest: "${artifact.destination}/${artifact.filename}"
        mode: '0644'
        owner: deploy
        group: deploy
      become: yes
      register: copy_result

    - name: Verify ${artifact.filename} was copied
      stat:
        path: "${artifact.destination}/${artifact.filename}"
      register: artifact_stat
      become: yes

    - name: Fail if ${artifact.filename} not found
      fail:
        msg: "Artifact ${artifact.filename} was not copied successfully"
      when: not artifact_stat.stat.exists
"""
    }
    
    def playbook = """---
- name: Deploy Artifacts
  hosts: deployment_servers
  gather_facts: yes
  serial: 1
  max_fail_percentage: 0
  
  tasks:
${tasks.join('\n')}

    - name: Create deployment marker
      copy:
        content: |
          Deployment Time: {{ ansible_date_time.iso8601 }}
          Build Number: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
          Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
        dest: /var/log/last_deployment.txt
        mode: '0644'
      become: yes
"""
    
    return playbook
}

def backupExistingArtifacts() {
    echo "Backing up existing artifacts on target servers..."
    
    withCredentials([
        sshUserPrivateKey(
            credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
            keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY'
        )
    ]) {
        sh """
            mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh
            cp \${SSH_KEY} ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
            chmod 600 ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
        """
        
        sh """
            ansible-playbook -i ${WORKSPACE}/inventory.ini \
                ${WORKSPACE}/deploy.yml \
                --tags backup \
                -v
        """
    }
    
    echo "Backup completed"
}

def deployToServers() {
    echo "Deploying artifacts to ${params.ENVIRONMENT} servers..."
    
    withCredentials([
        sshUserPrivateKey(
            credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
            keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY'
        )
    ]) {
        sh """
            mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh
            cp \${SSH_KEY} ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
            chmod 600 ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
        """
        
        def deployResult = sh(
            script: """
                ansible-playbook -i ${WORKSPACE}/inventory.ini \
                    ${WORKSPACE}/deploy.yml \
                    -v 2>&1 | tee ${DEPLOYMENT_LOG}
            """,
            returnStatus: true
        )
        
        if (deployResult != 0) {
            error("Deployment failed. Check ${DEPLOYMENT_LOG} for details.")
        }
    }
    
    echo "Deployment completed successfully"
}

def verifyDeployment() {
    echo "Verifying deployment..."
    
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    withCredentials([
        sshUserPrivateKey(
            credentialsId: 'deployment-ssh-key',
            keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY'
        )
    ]) {
        def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',')
        
        servers.each { server ->
            def trimmedServer = server.trim()
            echo "Verifying deployment on ${trimmedServer}..."
            
            artifacts.each { artifact ->
                def verifyScript = """
                    ssh -i ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key \
                        -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \
                        -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null \
                        deploy@${trimmedServer} \
                        "test -f ${artifact.destination}/${artifact.filename} && echo 'OK' || echo 'MISSING'"
                """
                
                def result = sh(
                    script: verifyScript,
                    returnStdout: true
                ).trim()
                
                if (result != 'OK') {
                    error("Artifact ${artifact.filename} not found on ${trimmedServer}")
                }
                
                echo "✓ ${artifact.filename} verified on ${trimmedServer}"
            }
        }
    }
    
    echo "Deployment verification completed successfully"
}

def performHealthCheck() {
    echo "Performing health checks on deployed services..."
    
    def servers = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS.split(',')
    
    servers.each { server ->
        def trimmedServer = server.trim()
        echo "Health check for ${trimmedServer}..."
        
        try {
            timeout(time: 5, unit: 'MINUTES') {
                waitUntil {
                    def healthStatus = sh(
                        script: "curl -f -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://${trimmedServer}:8080/health || echo '000'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()
                    
                    if (healthStatus == '200') {
                        echo "✓ ${trimmedServer} is healthy"
                        return true
                    } else {
                        echo "Waiting for ${trimmedServer} to become healthy... (status: ${healthStatus})"
                        sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
                        return false
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            error("Health check failed for ${trimmedServer}: ${e.message}")
        }
    }
    
    echo "All health checks passed"
}

def notifyDeploymentSuccess() {
    def jsonSlurper = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper()
    def artifacts = jsonSlurper.parseText(env.ARTIFACTS_CONFIG)
    
    def message = """
Deployment Successful!

Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
Build: #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Servers: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS}

Artifacts Deployed:
${artifacts.collect { "- ${it.filename} (${formatBytes(it.fileSize)})" }.join('\n')}

Deployment Time: ${new Date()}
"""
    
    echo message
    
    emailext(
        subject: "✓ Deployment Success - ${params.ENVIRONMENT} - Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
        body: message,
        to: '${DEFAULT_RECIPIENTS}',
        mimeType: 'text/plain'
    )
}

def notifyDeploymentFailure() {
    def message = """
Deployment Failed!

Environment: ${params.ENVIRONMENT}
Build: #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
Servers: ${params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVERS}

Check the build logs for details: ${env.BUILD_URL}

Deployment Time: ${new Date()}
"""
    
    echo message
    
    emailext(
        subject: "✗ Deployment Failed - ${params.ENVIRONMENT} - Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
        body: message,
        to: '${DEFAULT_RECIPIENTS}',
        mimeType: 'text/plain'
    )
}

def cleanupWorkspace() {
    echo "Cleaning up workspace..."
    
    sh """
        rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}
        rm -f ${WORKSPACE}/.ssh/deploy_key
        rm -f ${WORKSPACE}/inventory.ini
        rm -f ${WORKSPACE}/deploy.yml
    """
    
    echo "Cleanup completed"
}

def isValidHostname(String hostname) {
    def hostnamePattern = /^([a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?\.)*[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9\-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?$/
    return hostname.matches(hostnamePattern)
}

def isValidIPAddress(String ip) {
    def ipPattern = /^((25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)\.){3}(25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9][0-9]?)$/
    return ip.matches(ipPattern)
}

def formatBytes(long bytes) {
    if (bytes < 1024) return "${bytes} B"
    def exp = (int) (Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(1024))
    def pre = "KMGTPE".charAt(exp - 1)
    return String.format("%.2f %sB", bytes / Math.pow(1024, exp), pre)
}
